The '''''Blood Brother''''', formerly known as the '''''Dura-Khan III''''', was a heavily modified [[Consular III-class cruiser|''Consular III''-class cruiser]] used by [[Reddjak]], and the main command vessel for the [[Red Fury Brotherhood/Legends|Red Fury Brotherhood]].

==History==
Originally known as the ''Dura-Khan III'', the ''Blood Brother'' was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] diplomatic vessel that was commandeered by Reddjak the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]]. Like other diplomatic vessels, the ship was painted red to denote its status of neutrality. After Reddjak claimed the ship, he kept the color scheme.<ref name="ref name=EOTJ" />

*{{DoD|Echoes of the Jedi}}
